context: Evaluates the agent's ability to map TypeScript strictness conventions to tsconfig.json.

checklist.name: Strict mode enabled
checklist.description: strict: true or both strictNullChecks and noImplicitAny are enabled

checklist.name: Existing settings preserved
checklist.description: Other tsconfig settings are not lost

checklist.name: Change explained
checklist.description: The rationale for the config change is provided
